mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
x.createdAtRaw ASC x.createdAtRaw DESC

where.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reports r WHERE r.target_type = 'COMMENT' AND r.target_id = c.comment_id )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c JOIN vw_account_display d ON c.account_id = d.account_id
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = 'HIDDEN', deleted = 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
